headline: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Stock After 43% Slide Is The Valuation Reset Enough
summary: If you are wondering whether Verisk Analytics at around US$173.80 is starting to look interesting on price, this article walks through the key valuation checks that matter most. The stock has fallen about 5.4% over the past week and around 21.4% year to date, with a decline of 42.7% over the past 12 months. This may have changed how investors view both its potential and its risks. Recent coverage of Verisk Analytics has focused on the stock's sharp share price pullback and what it could mean...
